mapper.sql: n.id, n.title, n.notice_type, n.content, n.publish_status, n.pinned, n.publisher_id, u.real_name AS publisher_name, n.publish_time, n.created_by, n.updated_by
mapper.select:
SELECT n.id, n.title, n.notice_type, n.publish_status, n.pinned, u.real_name AS publisher_name, n.publish_time, ( SELECT COUNT(1) FROM biz_attachment ba WHERE ba.deleted = 0 AND ba.biz_type = 'notice' AND ba.biz_id = n.id ) AS attachment_count FROM biz_notice n LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON u.id = n.publisher_id AND u.deleted = 0 WHERE
ORDER BY n.pinned DESC, n.publish_time DESC, n.id DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{pageSize}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM biz_notice n WHERE

SELECT
FROM biz_notice n LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON u.id = n.publisher_id AND u.deleted = 0 WHERE n.id = #{id} AND n.deleted = 0

SELECT
FROM biz_notice n LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON u.id = n.publisher_id AND u.deleted = 0 WHERE n.id = #{id} AND n.deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO biz_notice ( title, notice_type, content, publish_status, pinned, publisher_id, publish_time, created_by, updated_by, deleted, version ) VALUES ( #{title}, #{noticeType}, #{content}, #{publishStatus}, #{pinned}, #{publisherId}, CASE WHEN #{publishStatus} = 1 THEN NOW() ELSE NULL END, #{createdBy}, #{updatedBy}, 0, 0 )
mapper.update: UPDATE biz_notice SET title = #{title}, notice_type = #{noticeType}, content = #{content}, publish_status = #{publishStatus}, pinned = #{pinned}, publish_time = CASE WHEN #{publishStatus} = 1 AND publish_time IS NULL THEN NOW() WHEN #{publishStatus} = 0 THEN NULL ELSE publish_time END, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = NOW(), version = version + 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE biz_notice SET deleted = 1, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = NOW(), version = version + 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0

UPDATE biz_notice SET publish_status = #{publishStatus}, publish_time = CASE WHEN #{publishStatus} = 1 THEN NOW() ELSE NULL END, updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = NOW(), version = version + 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
